title: ElytraRework
description:
Campfire Boosting and Firework disabling Plugin.
(inspired by Eleron/Aileron)
body:
![description of plugin but image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b1a7aa81c788bc6c400fc5392ba0bada309bfc4.png)

# Elytra Rework
Elytra Rework is a plugin that attempts to rework the Elytra as it's kind of an overpowered mode of transport.
It adds a feature where flying over a campfire boosts the player into the air. (inspired by Eleron/Aileron.)
Everything in the plugin should be configurable (Configuration Below), _it seemed to work when i tried._
This plugin might suck, its my first real
working plugin.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/zUdwAb5QcV0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>





```
# Elytra Rework
config-ver: 2
debug-mode: true
# Elytra Firework Change
firework-boost-enabled: false
# Elytra Campfire Boost
campfire-boost: true
campfire-boost-amount: 2
signal-campfire-boost-amount: 3
campfire-boost-delay: 1 #seconds
campfire-boost-sound:
  sound: minecraft:entity.breeze.land
  volume: 5
  pitch: 0.8
# Elytra Enchantments
allow-mending: true
allow-unbreaking: true
allow-curse-of-binding: true
allow-curse-of-vanishing: true
```
